---
name: Concept proposal
about: Propose a new RALF concept or change to an existing concept
title: "Concept: "
labels: concept, needs-review
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this concept solve?

## Existing foundation

Which existing standard, framework, protocol, or practice is related?

## RALF addition

What does RALF need to add beyond the existing foundation?

## Related RALF concepts

Which concepts are affected?

- [ ] Domain
- [ ] Lifecycle
- [ ] Role
- [ ] Agent
- [ ] Skill
- [ ] Knowledge asset
- [ ] Tool
- [ ] Artifact
- [ ] Gate
- [ ] Trace
- [ ] Context packet

## Human accountability

What human role remains responsible or accountable?

## Example

Provide a small example in plain English or YAML.
